scripts.cdp:status: node --input-type=module -e "import { cdpStatus } from './src/cdp-client.mjs'; console.log(JSON.stringify(await cdpStatus(), null, 2));"
scripts.cdp:launch: node --input-type=module -e "import { launchCdpChrome } from './src/cdp-client.mjs'; console.log(JSON.stringify(await launchCdpChrome(), null, 2));"
scripts.cdp:list: node --input-type=module -e "import { listCdpTabs } from './src/cdp-client.mjs'; console.log(JSON.stringify(await listCdpTabs(), null, 2));"
scripts.cdp:open: node --input-type=module -e "import { openCdpTab } from './src/cdp-client.mjs'; console.log(JSON.stringify(await openCdpTab({ url: 'https://gemini.google.com/app' }), null, 2));"
